title: Spicy Kai Luen Quick Gluten-Free
description: A quick and easy Malaysian dish featuring spicy Chinese broccoli with a side of pickles for a juicy and flavorful gluten-free meal.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add garlic powder, spicy chili sauce, and salt. Stir until fragrant.
Add Chinese broccoli florets to the pan with some water (about 1/4 cup), cover, and cook for about 3-5 minutes or until tender.
Remove lid, add soy sauce and stir well. Cook another minute until liquid is absorbed.
Fold in gluten-free bread crumbs gently using tongs, allowing the mixture to lightly brown on all sides.
Add pickle relish at the last minute, stirring it into the dish for added texture and flavor.
